raw_text: First time visiting india and this app was recommended by hotel staff. Trying to sort out my first order but when i try to finalize and select the delivery address, the Save address button does absolutely nothing...

Thank you for the excellent service! My order was delivered quickly, and everything arrived in perfect condition. The delivery partner was polite, professional, and handled the order with care. The entire experience was smooth and hassle-free. I really appreciate the fast delivery and great customer service. Keep up the amazing work!

Day by day, their item handling is getting worse. Today my order arrived without any packaging—the delivery person simply handed over the items with no bag at all. Yet, they continue to charge a significant amount under “handling charges,” which clearly doesn’t reflect the actual service being provided. and just clarify my location is Kharagpur and it happened so many times.

Very Bad experience as they have not delivered one of my product I have contacted support team they have asked delivery partner and store for that they said it is delivered but I have proof of it also of call with delivery partner where he have accepted it I even send these recordings to them but they have not taken any action and this missing of items happened 2-3 times with me very bad service and support team .All things are corrupted here.

Blinkit is a very useful app with fast delivery and good service. It saves a lot of time and is easy to use. However, sometimes the service becomes unavailable for a few hours and shows messages like "Come back at 8:00 PM," which can be inconvenient. Overall, it is still a great app and very helpful for quick deliveries.

Blinkit. You don't have 80% of the times people available to deliver your order. And when you do, you randomly remove some items because they are magically unavailable. Now how do I order one bread without paying a surge and delivery on it? I do not want refund, I want the food item. You keep me hungry for half an hour extra. I sincerely hope, with all my heart, that your company gets shut down. And I will never ever ever use your app again, and tell everyone to not to. This is beyond pathetic.

The app is fine, but the delivery people who come through this app don't have a good way of talking to customers. They also blame the customer for everything. I want the delivery partners to improve this shortcoming. That's why I will give them a review — although they don't even deserve it."

it's the best platform when u need in minutes like groceries etc it's very useful to me and pls make sure that if I order only 1 item or more the total amount is very more and if I order one items it shows more to me overall I loved using the app so far

always late in delivering the products and they can't even read the address and reach the destination. they follow the map which always takes them to the wrong direction, and the order is further delayed because they only follow the map and can't read the address clearly. today again the order is delayed, was supposed to reach at 12.14 already 12 20pm and shows further delay of 5 min. very poor service. kindly employ staff who know the area very well.

I have ordered a mouse trap. It was defective and the product quality is also too weak. I request to return the product many times. but either there is no response or no resolution of the problem. Truly, the return policy is too bad.

Blinkit absolutely nailed it! The delivery was lightning-fast — arrived well within 10 minutes. All produce and items were incredibly fresh. Every single item in my order was correct — no substitutions or missing items. Couldn't be happier with my experience — this is grocery delivery done right.

I would not even give one star. Received a product worth 5000 which was used, seal was tampered and product parts are missing. Blink it is not replacing it or refunding it. Telling they are not responsible. After transferring chats with 7 different executives for 3 hours at last they are telling we are not responsible for faulty products, I did not expect such inappropriate and irresponsiveness from blinkit. worst experience, don't order expensive products or you will end up losing money

this is the best source and delivery person are even prefer excellent I think they should not work overnight 😕. otherwise this is the best source we can just go and order on it and it is exact of it the correct timing at 10 minutes delivery and it never ask your location on the phone calls like other apps.

blinkit has fallen so much First cheap trick to get the money out from people anyhow for not ordering above 499 and then now their servers are lagging due to which the same order came 3 times and they are calling me while cancelling the order that my COD is being blocked by them for cancelling while it's their fault that their servers are ordering 1 order 3 times goshh

wors humiliating . 1st delivery boy forgets my order in store, after half delivery, he deny his mistake. told me he will contact. he didn't. customer service - more poor, didn't have call option. in chat- they are not available, even after being online, takes too much time first to read, then to reply. I will have to shift to other app. As if I face problem in future, assistance is must, rest can be managed

I have been delivered wrong and damaged products for last 2 times and there hase been no answer to that. i am not able to raise a concern on the app, it gets closed even before i put up my complaint. i have shared over the email, you guys dont want to look into its so youbhave just mentioned it is all right from our end. the customer is the thief.

Worst app ever. I ordered hair colour and received empty packet. The product was out of stock. If you don't have the product why did you send empty packet. It's you mistake that you dont have product in stock.

Blinkit fulfill my every need without much hustle,they deliver products even when you are resting at your home just place order and then no worries,the app is very simple to use,and their wide range of products help us to purchase the most appropriate Thanks to Blinkit.

worst customer service ever. for a visible broken laptop table, they are not providing me refund for more than 12 hours. I'm keeping on trying to contact the customer service. Every time they want me to connect to customer care again and again and those every time I need to record my item's damage again and again.

Worst experience with Blinkit. The store is just 300 meters away, yet orders keep getting cancelled after making customers wait for almost an hour. Not even a delivery agent gets assigned, and then the store cancels the order without any proper reason. This is not just a payment issue — almost 2K of my money has been stuck for 3 days because of repeated order failures and delayed refunds. Customer support is useless and gives no proper resolution. Completely unreliable and frustrating service.
